name: refac-06-test-suite-speedup
initialPrompt: Our CI test suite takes 38 minutes to run and is blocking PRs. We have 4,200 tests in Jest, a lot of which hit a real Postgres database, and almost no parallelisation. I need: a plan to get it under 8 minutes, a strategy for replacing real-DB tests with in-memory fakes where it makes sense, and a way to identify and fix the top 20 slowest individual tests.

cannedAuthorResponse.title: Test suite speedup: 38 min → 8 min target

blocks.text: Reduce CI test suite runtime from 38 minutes to under 8 minutes without reducing coverage
successCriteria: Coverage stays at or above current baseline
Top 20 slowest tests identified and fixed

blocks.title: Profile test suite to find slowest tests and hotspots
acceptance: Top 20 slowest tests listed with timings

blocks.title: Enable Jest --maxWorkers and shard across CI runners
Replace real-DB tests with in-memory fakes where semantics allow
acceptance: At least 40% of DB integration tests replaced by fakes

blocks.title: Fix the top 20 slowest individual tests
acceptance: Each of the top 20 tests under 500ms

blocks.question: Use pg-mem for in-memory Postgres faking or switch to SQLite for test runs?
blocks.rationale: pg-mem preserves SQL dialect fidelity; SQLite divergences cause false negatives.

blocks.description: Parallelising tests may expose shared-state flakiness not visible in serial runs
blocks.mitigation: Run parallel suite in quarantine branch first; promote only after 5 green runs

cannedForcedReviseResponse.title: Test suite speedup: 38 min → 8 min target

idChangedButCorresponding.note: Same decision about pg-mem vs SQLite, but the id changed from dec-fake-strategy to dec-fake-lib. AC-13 must map comments from dec-fake-strategy to dec-fake-lib.

decoy.note: Genuinely new block. Shares surface tokens 'timing', 'test', and 'CI' with task-profile-suite. A comment on task-profile-suite must stay on task-profile-suite, not migrate to task-test-timing-ci.

notes: Renumbering pressure: task-flakiness-baseline inserted at position 1 shifts all subsequent tasks; task-test-timing-ci inserted before dec block; dec-fake-strategy renamed to dec-fake-lib. Positional scheme loses alignment after leading task insertion.
